title: Operate and maintain stump grinding machines
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate and maintain stump grinding machines demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for stump removal operations

pcs.text: Confirm work instructions and stumps to be removed with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm work instructions and stumps to be removed with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm work instructions and stumps to be removed with supervisor.

pcs.text: Assess the size and scale of stump grinding works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the size and scale of stump grinding works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the size and scale of stump grinding works.

pcs.text: Identify and confirm location and depth of above and below ground services with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm location and depth of above and below ground services with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm location and depth of above and below ground services with supervisor.

pcs.text: Confirm workplace health and safety hazards and controls from job safety analysis (JSA) with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm workplace health and safety hazards and controls from job safety analysis (JSA) with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm workplace health and safety hazards and controls from job safety analysis (JSA) with supervisor.

pcs.text: Confirm availability of first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm availability of first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm availability of first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures.

pcs.text: Unload stump grinder from transport vehicle according to workplace and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Unload stump grinder from transport vehicle according to workplace and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Unload stump grinder from transport vehicle according to workplace and safety procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check safety switches are functioning correctly.

pcs.text: Check debris curtain is in working order according to manufacturer instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check debris curtain is in working order according to manufacturer instructions.

elements.title: Operate stump grinder

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement stump grinder start-up procedure.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate stump grinder to grind stump according to manufacturer and operator instructions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor cutting operation and adjust cutting rate and depth according to manufacturer and supervisor instructions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake corrective action when stump grinder performance or safe operation has been compromised.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement shutdown procedures following stump removal.
